notes: Limit to own department's planning inputs.
Use Company + Department if entities are multi-company.
Can also use hierarchy if you maintain manager structure.

recommended_applicable_for: Procurement Plan; Procurement Plan Item; Revisions
notes: Multi-entity planners need explicit company permissions.
Also add Cost Center or Project where needed.
Avoid global read in shared-service environments.
Use Supplier only if team is partitioned by supplier portfolio.
Do not rely on role alone; restrict to supplier record.
